category_sources: Official Tombi docs describe a TOML toolkit providing formatter, linter, and language server.
source_facts.description says it is a TOML formatter, linter, and language server.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and GitHub README use Tombi.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the Tombi documentation site.
Official docs overview provides installation, CLI, language-server, configuration, and reference sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/tombi-toml/tombi; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include cli, toml, formatter, language-server, linter, and lsp.
source_facts.description identifies TOML formatter, linter, and language server roles.
